input.control: IA-2(1) — Multi-factor Authentication for Privileged Accounts
input.current_state: Only password authentication for AWS console; no MFA for break-glass accounts.

output.objective: Roll out phishing-resistant MFA for all privileged AWS console and IAM Identity Center accounts within 30 days.
prerequisites: FIDO2 security keys procured for break-glass accounts
Communication plan approved by IT leadership

steps.action: Enable MFA enforcement on the AWS Organizations management account.
Distribute and enroll FIDO2 keys for break-glass accounts; store backup keys in dual-control safe.
Configure IAM Identity Center to require MFA on every sign-in and on session refresh.
Run a force-reauth event and capture CloudTrail evidence of MFA challenges.
Update runbooks and onboarding checklist to include MFA enrollment.

input.current_state: Logs are centralized but never reviewed.

output.objective: Establish weekly audit log review covering authentication, privileged action, and data export events.

steps.action: Define event taxonomy and severity matrix.
Build saved searches for the three review domains.
Schedule weekly review meeting and capture sign-off in ticketing.
